subcodes.first_line: O servant of the All-Knowing Lord! Thou art ever in my thoughts, before mine eyes, and within my sight. I have not forgotten thee, nor shall I ever forget [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده رب علام همیشه در خاطری و در نظری و پیش بصری فراموش ننموده و نخواهم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
